The '''''Goshyn Queen''''', a modified [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[Space Master medium transport]], was the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Billey]]. It was named for the [[Goshyn Detention Center]], where Billey had served time prior to buying the ship. The ship was often in poor condition, as Billey was only willing to pay for the most essential repairs.

{{Ship-stub}}
